subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Ayat-i-az Suriy-i-Ra'd (Commentary on a Verse from the Surih of the Thunder)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The tongues of the eloquent ones give utterance to wondrous and comprehensive wellsprings of praise and thanksgiving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله تنطق السن البلغاء ببدایع جوامع منابع اذکار الحمد و الثناء و مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @symbolism
